entrypoint_policy: Only modules/writing/main.py is public. modules/writing/scripts contains no runtime scripts.
web_contract: Web sends Paper work/chat only to Framework. Framework invokes main.py --action work/chat. Writing owns the queue, interruption, session mapping, project artifacts, and web-visible replies.
writing_controller_policy: Each project owns one modules/writing Claude UUID in .runtime/controller_sessions.json. Work, chat, and blocked-audit repair resume only it with projects/<project> as cwd; audit Claude processes are fresh and independent.
skill_policy: main.py prompts require Claude Code to read modules/writing/SKILL.md and skills/skill-router/SKILL.md before selecting task-specific skills.
skill_helper_scripts_policy: Every remaining skills/*/scripts helper is named by a SKILL.md and provides deterministic template, citation, LaTeX, or evidence checks; helpers are not public entrypoints or decision routes.
audit_policy: Audit and judgment are handled by a separate Claude Code process launched from main.py with skills/writing-audit/SKILL.md.
repair_loop_policy: When audit returns blocked, main.py sends blockers and repair_instructions back to the persistent Writing controller, then launches a fresh independent audit round over projects/<project>/paper/writing/.
vendor_policy: No vendor runtime route; writing methods live in skills/ and Claude prompts.
